channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 7.2%.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Streeting says he will battle Burnham for Labour leadership
item.description: Streeting says he will battle Burnham for Labour leadership

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham says Labour must put energy and water under public control
item.description: Andy Burnham says Labour must put energy and water under public control

item.title: Reuters: Former minister Streeting says he will stand in any contest to replace UK's Starmer - Reuters
item.description: Former minister Streeting says he will stand in any contest to replace UK's Starmer - Reuters

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham expected to drop call to reverse Brexit as poll shows voters divided on PM prospects
item.description: Burnham expected to drop call to reverse Brexit as poll shows voters divided on PM prospects

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Streeting launches Labour leadership bid with call to rejoin EU
item.description: Politics latest: Streeting launches Labour leadership bid with call to rejoin EU

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Key points from Wes Streeting speech as he launches leadership bid with pledge to rejoin EU
item.description: Key points from Wes Streeting speech as he launches leadership bid with pledge to rejoin EU

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting confirms he will stand if Labour leadership race is triggered
item.description: Wes Streeting confirms he will stand if Labour leadership race is triggered

item.title: i Politics: Starmer could stand aside for Burnham - but here’s why it's not that simple
item.description: Starmer could stand aside for Burnham - but here’s why it's not that simple

item.title: The Telegraph: What a Wes Streeting premiership would look like - The Telegraph
item.description: What a Wes Streeting premiership would look like - The Telegraph

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Wes Streeting correct on Labour not having had a battle of ideas for more than a decade – and why that has to change.
item.description: Wes Streeting correct on Labour not having had a battle of ideas for more than a decade – and why that has to change.
